name: ExecuteCommand
description: Terminal-style UX component for running scripts with arguments and tailing log output
useCase: Test and run any registered script/capability with configurable args, live log output, process control (execute/kill)

usage.command: The script command to pre-populate (e.g. 'node scripts/hello-world.js')
usage.args: Array of {name, value, placeholder} objects to pre-populate arg fields

name: Hello World
description: Greeting script that takes a name and logs hello in 3 languages
useCase: Demo/test script for validating the ExecuteCommand component
